title: NEB Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix PCR
description: New England Biolabs Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix (M0492): 50 uL high-fidelity reaction with a 98 C denaturation and 72 C extension.

payload.notes: Vendor: New England Biolabs (NEB), Q5 High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix #M0492. Annealing: use the NEB Tm Calculator (tmcalculator.neb.com); typically anneal 10-30 sec at ~3 C above the Tm of the lower-Tm primer. The 60 C shown is a placeholder starting point, set it from your primers. Run a 50-72 C gradient if the band is weak or nonspecific; a 2-step protocol (combine anneal+extend at 72 C) works for primer pairs with Ta >= 72 C. Cycles 25-35 (30-35 for genomic). Extension 20-30 sec/kb (10 sec/kb for simple templates, up to 40-50 sec/kb for products >6 kb). Add 1X Q5 High GC Enhancer for GC-rich or failed reactions. Source: https://www.neb.com/en-us/protocols/protocol-for-q5-high-fidelity-2x-master-mix-m0492
